exception.message: The error message when locked user trying to login is not as expected. Expected: is "Epic sadface: Sorry, this user has been locked....." but: was "Epic sadface: Sorry, this user has been locked out."
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: The error message when locked user trying to login is not as expected.
